{{CargoRelic
|name=ENIAC Prototype
|rank=AA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=12-12
|source=Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Murikan Treasure Map (10%), Wishing (0.36%)
|description=On Dec 12, 1946, the world's first electronic digital computer was created.

The two-year R&D of ENIAC was a hard time for engineers Goldstein, Mauchly and Eckert. Fully presenting Turin's idea, ENIAC is able to design various programs based on the engineer's requirements. It can calculate the projectile of a cannonball in just 20 seconds, even faster than the speed of the cannonball itself. With these functions, it has become a milestone in the history of computers and a new starting point for the development of computing technology.

[About ENIAC]

Weight: 30 tons<br>Switches: 6000<br>Parts: 11,468 pcs<br>Calculations: 5000 times/s
|fame=46
|art=32
|fth=41
|civ=39
|tech=70
|ss1=Time Machine upgrade Stone Cost -2%<br>Time Machine upgrade Wood Cost -2%
|ss2=Time Machine upgrade Stone Cost -3%<br>Time Machine upgrade Wood Cost -3%
|ss3=Time Machine upgrade Stone Cost -4%<br>Time Machine upgrade Wood Cost -4%
|ss4=Time Machine upgrade Stone Cost -6%<br>Time Machine upgrade Wood Cost -6%
|ss5=Time Machine upgrade Stone Cost -8%<br>Time Machine upgrade Wood Cost -8%
|ss7=Time Machine upgrade Stone Cost -8%<br>Time Machine upgrade Wood Cost -8%<br>Time Machine upgrade Stone Cost -7% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]] Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, TECH Checks -10
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]] Place in Murikan Museum: This Relic's TECH +10
}}

[[Category:Time Machine Upgrade Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:TECH Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:DNA Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by DNA Strength]]
[[Category:Wood Golem Boost]]
